-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw-mcp)[Privacy Policy](https://plus.excalidraw.com/privacy-policy)[Support](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw-mcp/issues)
    

The official Excalidraw MCP app allowing you to build interactive visual applications right in Claude. Ask Claude to create hand-drawn style diagrams using Excalidraw with smooth viewport camera control and interactive fullscreen editing.

You can use Excalidraw to:

**Neural network visualizations:**  
"Show how a neural network forward pass works"

**Component lifecycle diagrams:**  
"Map out the React component lifecycle"

**Git branching strategy:**  
"Draw a Git branching strategy with feature, develop, and main"

**Decision trees:**  
"Create a decision tree for choosing a database"
